prestazioni: AR32002 2.0L Twin Spark (16V) engine (engine code: AR32002) - Full forged internals upgrade with JE 87mm forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ARP head studs for 300+ HP reliability on 98 RON fuel. Pair with a custom-mapped Marelli IAW 59F ECU reflash by Alfa Romeo specialist Autodelta UK, optimizing ignition timing and fuel maps for aggressive cam profiles.

Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (ball-bearing, 0.63 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Bell Auto Services, paired with a Tial 44mm external wastegate and 3-inch downpipe with GESI high-flow catalytic converter for Euro 6 compliance. Intercooled with a custom front-mount Spearco 600x300x76mm intercooler and silicone charge pipes by Vibrant Performance.

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part #ALF001) with 8-position adjustable damping, custom-valved for the 916 Spider’s double-wishbone front and multi-link rear suspension. Pair with Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers (front) and 25mm (rear) to correct scrub radius, and spherical bearing conversion for front control arms by Alfa Romeo specialist GTV6 North America.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (916 Spider-specific) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders, paired with a custom ducktail spoiler by Zender (part #Z30-001) for balanced aero. Painted in Alfa Rosso Competizione with matte black accents on the lower cladding and mirror caps.

OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 17x8.5 ET35 (front) and 17x9.5 ET30 (rear) wheels, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/45/17 front, 255/40/17 rear). Brake upgrade with Brembo GT 330mm 2-piece rotors (front) and 305mm (rear), paired with Brembo 4-piston calipers (part #09.9404.11) and Ferodo DS2500 pads.

Custom interior retrim by Trim Design UK with Recaro SRD-E carbon fiber seats (916-specific mounting brackets), Alcantara-wrapped MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm), and custom aluminum shift knob by Alfa Romeo specialist Alfaholics. Full sound deadening with Dynamat Extreme and a custom 8-speaker Focal Utopia Be audio system with Audison bit One.1 DSP amplifier.
